subject: [AAI] Releasing the Istanbul AAI Docker Images
commit_message:
[AAI] Releasing the Istanbul AAI Docker Images

Included changes are global requirement, schema, and security updates

Issue-ID: AAI-3375
Change-Id: I3e064fef882dc2593e85f1cef75320404338a626
Signed-off-by: wr148d <wr148d@att.com>

Patch Set 8: Code-Review-1

@William we should add to the main values schema v24 supported and we should set default to v24 as well. Changes added for k8s resource are present only in v24 schema.

Due to that, SDC model distribution fails in AAI. aai modelloader uses v24 schema that is not exposed on API lvl. I am only wondering why onap-sdk distribution step does not fail.
